vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome has undergone a total structural collapse and removal of the primary botanical subjects.

plant_audit.P3_Pothos: Absent. Pot and anchor (white rabbit) removed from frame.

biome_observations.surface_status: The desk surface is now occupied by electronic hardware (Seeed LinkIt Smart box) and cabling. The botanical environment has been completely cleared.
biome_observations.anomalies: Total removal of all biological specimens and containers.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-1: Gradual degradation of soil moisture and potential desiccation of plant matter, though specimens remained visible.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Complete environmental reset. The botanical setup has been replaced by non-biological office/electronic equipment.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is no longer active. The plants have been removed from the observation area.
anomalies: Introduction of Seeed LinkIt Smart packaging and associated wiring.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a terminal state for the botanical project. Over the observed sequence, the plants remained in a static, potentially struggling state (indicated by soil dryness and lack of visible growth). In the final transition, the entire botanical assembly was removed and replaced with electronic hardware, indicating a cessation of the botanical experiment.
